title: gh-146093: Fix csv _set_str(): check if PyUnicode_DecodeASCII() failed
author: vstinner
body:
The function can fail on a memory allocation failure.

Bug reported by devdanzin.

<!--

Where: gh-NNNNNN refers to the GitHub issue number.

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: Writing a test requires using `_testcapi.set_nomemory()` with a precise number of allocations. It's hard to write a reliable test for that. So I skipped the test instead.

comments.author: serhiy-storchaka
comments.body: It can also fail for non-ASCII data, isn't?
